headline: Best comedy picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better comedy picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring Dream Girl 2, Sukhee, and zakir mannpasand — plus more comedy picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best comedy picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring Dream Girl 2, Sukhee, and zakir mannpasand — plus more comedy picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: Dream Girl 2
selected_titles.description: The sequel to the hit Hindi comedy, likely continuing the protagonist's voice-mimicking adventures.

selected_titles.title: Sukhee
selected_titles.description: A feel-good Hindi comedy likely centered around a character's journey to happiness.

selected_titles.title: zakir mannpasand
selected_titles.description: A light, feel-good comedy centered on relationships, family bonds, and a man whose likable nature brings joy and chaos in equal measure.

selected_titles.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
selected_titles.description: A Hindi comedy-horror sequel about a haunted mansion and strange occurrences.

selected_titles.title: Emily in Paris
selected_titles.description: An American comedy series about a young woman's adventures in the fashion industry in Paris.

selected_titles.title: Panchayat
selected_titles.description: A heartwarming Hindi comedy series depicting life in rural India through the eyes of a city-bred government officer.

selected_titles.title: ted lasso
selected_titles.description: A heartwarming comedy series about an American football coach who moves to England to manage a soccer team.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
